title: Crypto internship / earning job — learn to run before flying
html:
TL;DR

  • April 27, 2021 todo whose title is the philosophy: "Crypto internship / earning job (learning to run before flying)" — Yahir at 18 articulating his own sequencing rule inside a chore list.
  • The action items: python code learning, begin crypto trading lessons, take karate with dad? / excited with dad, other credit card, fix car light ✅, eTrade account, account for Emilio, maya trip w/ cuzins.
  • The triple of python + crypto-trading + eTrade in the same note maps the spring-2021 window where Yahir is consciously building the base layer (skill + capital infrastructure) before chasing the crypto-fly.
  • "take karate with dad? / excited with dad" — rare positive dad relationship capture; karate is sequenced as the discipline-building, not as a side activity. Same dad-coding pattern as the December Cameron message (which references dad's stoicism wisdom).
  • "account for Emilio" — Yahir setting up brokerage/financial infra for his younger brother Emilio at the same moment he's setting up his own. The custodial-account move recurs in 2021 05 16 osu housing owen.

Source quote

Title: "-Crypto internship / earning job (learning to run before flying)"

"—python code learning / -begin crypto trading lessons / -take karate with dad? / excited with dad / -other credit card / -fix car ligh. ✅t / -etrade account / -account for Emilio / -maya trip w/ cuzins"

Open questions

  • Did the crypto trading lessons happen formally (course, mentor) or self-taught from YouTube?
  • The eTrade account — was it ever activated? No P&L surfaced anywhere in the corpus.
  • Karate-with-dad: did this become a regular activity or stay aspirational?

Wikilinks
